'''Miss Vix''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Vjun fox]] native to [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]. She was a [[Force familiar]] of [[Viscount (title)/Legends|Viscountess]] [[Whirry Malreaux]], who she constantly followed. She lived with her master in the [[Château Malreaux]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
